_note_rare_slot: Weights are integers /10000. Rare Secret is held at the documented ex-Dragon rate of ~1 in 36 packs (~2.78%). The remaining 97.22% is split among Rare / Rare Holo / Rare Holo EX in the same proportions as a no-secret set (RS / SS): 58.33 / 33.33 / 8.33 scaled by 0.9722. Previously the secret rate was carved out of Rare only, leaving Holo and Holo EX rates untouched — that overrepresented the chase tiers in DR vs the other sets.
